The '''Quarren War''' was a short-lived conflict between the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] that was fought two decades prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Merai]] was a decorated hero of the conflict.<ref name="GORW:47" />
